member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.AspNetCore.AspNetCoreInstrumentation
member.summary: Asp.Net Core Requests instrumentation.

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.AspNetCore.AspNetCoreTraceInstrumentationOptions
member.summary: Options for requests instrumentation.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.AspNetCore.AspNetCoreTraceInstrumentationOptions.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.AspNetCore.AspNetCoreTraceInstrumentationOptions.Filter
member.summary: Gets or sets a filter function that determines whether to collect telemetry on a per-request basis.
member.remarks:
Notes:
The return value for the filter function is interpreted as:
If filter returns , the request is collected.
If filter returns or throws an exception the request is NOT collected.

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.AspNetCore.AspNetCoreTraceInstrumentationOptions.EnrichWithHttpRequest
member.summary: Gets or sets an action to enrich an Activity.

remarks.para: : the HttpRequest object from which additional information can be extracted to enrich the activity.

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.AspNetCore.AspNetCoreTraceInstrumentationOptions.EnrichWithHttpResponse
member.summary: Gets or sets an action to enrich an Activity.

remarks.para: : the HttpResponse object from which additional information can be extracted to enrich the activity.

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.AspNetCore.AspNetCoreTraceInstrumentationOptions.EnrichWithException
member.summary: Gets or sets an action to enrich an Activity.

remarks.para: : the Exception object from which additional information can be extracted to enrich the activity.

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.AspNetCore.AspNetCoreTraceInstrumentationOptions.RecordException
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the exception will be recorded as ActivityEvent or not.

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.AspNetCore.AspNetCoreTraceInstrumentationOptions.EnableAspNetCoreSignalRSupport
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether SignalR activities are recorded.
member.remarks: Defaults to true. Only applies to .NET 9.0 or greater.

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.AspNetCore.AspNetCoreTraceInstrumentationOptions.EnableRazorComponentsSupport
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Razor Components (Blazor) activities are recorded.
member.remarks: Defaults to true. Only applies to .NET 10.0 or greater.

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.AspNetCore.AspNetCoreTraceInstrumentationOptions.EnableGrpcAspNetCoreSupport
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether RPC attributes are added to an Activity when using Grpc.AspNetCore.

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.AspNetCore.AspNetCoreTraceInstrumentationOptions.DisableUrlQueryRedaction
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the url query value should be redacted or not.
member.remarks: The query parameter values are redacted with value set as Redacted. e.g. `?key1=value1` is set as `?key1=Redacted`. The redaction can be disabled by setting this property to .

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.AspNetCore.Implementation.AspNetCoreInstrumentationEventSource
member.summary: EventSource events emitted from the project.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.GrpcTagHelper.ResolveSpanStatusForGrpcStatusCodeOnClient(System.Int32)
member.summary: Helper method that populates span properties from RPC status code according to https://github.com/open-telemetry/semantic-conventions/blob/main/docs/rpc/grpc.md#client. This method is for client spans where all non-OK status codes are considered errors.
member.returns: Resolved span for the Grpc status code.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.GrpcTagHelper.ResolveSpanStatusForGrpcStatusCodeOnServer(System.Int32)
member.summary: Helper method that populates span properties from RPC status code according to https://github.com/open-telemetry/semantic-conventions/blob/main/docs/rpc/grpc.md#server. This method is for server spans where only specific status codes are considered errors: UNKNOWN, DEADLINE_EXCEEDED, UNIMPLEMENTED, INTERNAL, UNAVAILABLE, and DATA_LOSS.
member.returns: Resolved span for the Grpc status code.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.GrpcTagHelper.GrpcMethodRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^/?(?<service>.*)/(?<method>.*)$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match '/' greedily, optionally.
○ "service" capture group.
○ Match a character other than '\n' greedily any number of times.
○ Match '/'.
○ "method" capture group.
○ Match a character other than '\n' greedily any number of times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.GrpcStatusCanonicalCode
member.summary: Canonical result code of span execution.
member.remarks: This follows the standard GRPC codes. https://github.com/grpc/grpc/blob/master/doc/statuscodes.md.

member.name: F:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.GrpcStatusCanonicalCode.Ok
member.summary: The operation completed successfully.

member.name: F:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.GrpcStatusCanonicalCode.Cancelled
member.summary: The operation was cancelled (typically by the caller).

member.name: F:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.GrpcStatusCanonicalCode.Unknown
member.summary: Unknown error. An example of where this error may be returned is if a Status value received from another address space belongs to an error-space that is not known in this address space. Also errors raised by APIs that do not return enough error information may be converted to this error.

member.name: F:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.GrpcStatusCanonicalCode.InvalidArgument
member.summary: Client specified an invalid argument. Note that this differs from FAILED_PRECONDITION. INVALID_ARGUMENT indicates arguments that are problematic regardless of the state of the system (e.g., a malformed file name).

member.name: F:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.GrpcStatusCanonicalCode.DeadlineExceeded
member.summary: Deadline expired before operation could complete. For operations that change the state of the system, this error may be returned even if the operation has completed successfully. For example, a successful response from a server could have been delayed long enough for the deadline to expire.

member.name: F:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.GrpcStatusCanonicalCode.NotFound
member.summary: Some requested entity (e.g., file or directory) was not found.

member.name: F:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.GrpcStatusCanonicalCode.AlreadyExists
member.summary: Some entity that we attempted to create (e.g., file or directory) already exists.

member.name: F:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.GrpcStatusCanonicalCode.PermissionDenied
member.summary: The caller does not have permission to execute the specified operation. PERMISSION_DENIED must not be used for rejections caused by exhausting some resource (use RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED instead for those errors). PERMISSION_DENIED must not be used if the caller cannot be identified (use UNAUTHENTICATED instead for those errors).

member.name: F:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.GrpcStatusCanonicalCode.ResourceExhausted
member.summary: Some resource has been exhausted, perhaps a per-user quota, or perhaps the entire file system is out of space.

member.name: F:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.GrpcStatusCanonicalCode.FailedPrecondition
member.summary: Operation was rejected because the system is not in a state required for the operation's execution. For example, directory to be deleted may be non-empty, an rmdir operation is applied to a non-directory, etc. A litmus test that may help a service implementor in deciding between FAILED_PRECONDITION, ABORTED, and UNAVAILABLE: (a) Use UNAVAILABLE if the client can retry just the failing call. (b) Use ABORTED if the client should retry at a higher-level (e.g., restarting a read-modify-write sequence). (c) Use FAILED_PRECONDITION if the client should not retry until the system state has been explicitly fixed. E.g., if an "rmdir" fails because the directory is non-empty, FAILED_PRECONDITION should be returned since the client should not retry unless they have first fixed up the directory by deleting files from it.

member.name: F:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.GrpcStatusCanonicalCode.Aborted
member.summary: The operation was aborted, typically due to a concurrency issue like sequencer check failures, transaction aborts, etc.

member.name: F:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.GrpcStatusCanonicalCode.OutOfRange
member.summary:
Operation was attempted past the valid range. E.g., seeking or reading past end of file.
Unlike INVALID_ARGUMENT, this error indicates a problem that may be fixed if the system state changes. For example, a 32-bit file system will generate INVALID_ARGUMENT if asked to read at an offset that is not in the range [0,2^32-1], but it will generate OUT_OF_RANGE if asked to read from an offset past the current file size.
There is a fair bit of overlap between FAILED_PRECONDITION and OUT_OF_RANGE. We recommend using OUT_OF_RANGE (the more specific error) when it applies so that callers who are iterating through a space can easily look for an OUT_OF_RANGE error to detect when they are done.

member.name: F:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.GrpcStatusCanonicalCode.Unimplemented
member.summary: Operation is not implemented or not supported/enabled in this service.

member.name: F:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.GrpcStatusCanonicalCode.Internal
member.summary: Internal errors. Means some invariants expected by underlying system has been broken. If you see one of these errors, something is very broken.

member.name: F:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.GrpcStatusCanonicalCode.Unavailable
member.summary:
The service is currently unavailable. This is a most likely a transient condition and may be corrected by retrying with a backoff.
See litmus test above for deciding between FAILED_PRECONDITION, ABORTED, and UNAVAILABLE.

member.name: F:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.GrpcStatusCanonicalCode.DataLoss
member.summary: Unrecoverable data loss or corruption.

member.name: F:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.GrpcStatusCanonicalCode.Unauthenticated
member.summary: The request does not have valid authentication credentials for the operation.

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.ListenerHandler
member.summary: ListenerHandler base class.

member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the supports NULL .

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.ListenerHandler.OnEventWritten(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Method called for an event which does not have 'Start', 'Stop' or 'Exception' as suffix.
member.param: An object that represent the value being passed as a payload for the event.

member.summary: PropertyFetcher fetches a property from an object.
member.typeparam: The type of the property being fetched.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Fetch the property from the object.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.PropertyFetcher`1.TryFetch(System.Object,`0@)
member.summary: Try to fetch the property from the object.

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Metrics.AspNetCoreInstrumentationMeterProviderBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods to simplify registering of ASP.NET Core request instrumentation.

member.summary: Enables the incoming requests automatic data collection for ASP.NET Core.
member.returns: The instance of to chain the calls.

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Trace.AspNetCoreInstrumentationTracerProviderBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods to simplify registering of ASP.NET Core request instrumentation.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Trace.AspNetCoreInstrumentationTracerProviderBuilderExtensions.AddAspNetCoreInstrumentation(OpenTelemetry.Trace.TracerProviderBuilder)
member.summary: Enables the incoming requests automatic data collection for ASP.NET Core.
member.returns: The instance of to chain the calls.

member.summary: Enables the incoming requests automatic data collection for ASP.NET Core.
member.returns: The instance of to chain the calls.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Trace.AspNetCoreInstrumentationTracerProviderBuilderExtensions.AddAspNetCoreInstrumentation(OpenTelemetry.Trace.TracerProviderBuilder,System.String,System.Action{OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.AspNetCore.AspNetCoreTraceInstrumentationOptions})
member.summary: Enables the incoming requests automatic data collection for ASP.NET Core.
member.param: Name which is used when retrieving options.
member.returns: The instance of to chain the calls.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Trace.ActivityHelperExtensions.GetTagValue(System.Diagnostics.Activity,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the value of a specific tag on an .
member.returns: Tag value or null if a match was not found.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Trace.ActivityHelperExtensions.TryCheckFirstTag(System.Diagnostics.Activity,System.String,System.Object@)
member.summary: Checks if the user provided tag name is the first tag of the and retrieves the tag value.
member.returns: if the first tag of the supplied Activity matches the user provide tag name.

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Trace.SemanticConventions
member.summary: Constants for semantic attribute names outlined by the OpenTelemetry specifications. .

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Trace.SpanHelper
member.summary: A collection of helper methods to be used when building spans.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Trace.SpanHelper.ResolveActivityStatusForHttpStatusCode(System.Diagnostics.ActivityKind,System.Int32)
member.summary: Helper method that populates Activity Status from http status code according to https://github.com/open-telemetry/semantic-conventions/blob/v1.24.0/docs/http/http-spans.md#status.
member.returns: Resolved span for the Http status code.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.ExceptionExtensions.ToInvariantString(System.Exception)
member.summary: Returns a culture-independent string representation of the given object, appropriate for diagnostics tracing.
member.returns: Exception as string with no culture.

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard
member.summary: Methods for guarding against exception throwing values.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfNull(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is null.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfNullOrEmpty(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is null or empty.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfNullOrWhitespace(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is null or whitespace.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfZero(System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is zero.
member.param: The message to use in the thrown exception.
The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfInvalidTimeout(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is not considered a valid timeout.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfOutOfRange(System.Int32,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is not within the given range.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.
The name of the lower bound.
The name of the upper bound.
An optional custom message to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfOutOfRange(System.Double,System.String,System.Double,System.Double,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is not within the given range.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.
The name of the lower bound.
The name of the upper bound.
An optional custom message to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfNotOfType``1(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is not of the expected type.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.
member.typeparam: The type attempted to convert to.
member.returns: The value casted to the specified type.

member.summary: Custom -derived type for the GrpcMethodRegex method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GrpcMethodRegex_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GrpcMethodRegex_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GrpcMethodRegex_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GrpcMethodRegex_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GrpcMethodRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GrpcMethodRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GrpcMethodRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GrpcMethodRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.
